name: silcrow
description: A lightweight client-side runtime for hypermedia-driven applications

scripts.mcp:reload: pkill -SIGHUP -f 'mcp/server/server.js' && echo 'MCP server reloaded' || echo 'No running MCP server found'
scripts.mcp:redoc: npm run build:docs && npm run mcp:reload
scripts.mcp:test: node mcp/server/test/smoke.js && node mcp/server/test/tools.js && node mcp/server/test/analyze.js
